name: 法玛斯 | 机械工业
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It's stark white and black design make it feel like it came from a sci-fi show. Spikey blue hair and robot companion not included
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器的亮白色和黑色图案使其像是来自科幻展。 恕不奉送尖刺般的蓝发和机器人伴侣
